name: marketing_skills_for_ai_agents
description: Provides marketing-related skills and capabilities for Claude Code and AI agents, including conversion rate optimization (CRO), copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering to enhance marketing performance and strategy.

inputs.name: marketing_data
inputs.description: Raw or processed marketing data such as web traffic, conversion metrics, copy drafts, keywords, or analytics reports.

inputs.name: task_description
inputs.description: Description of the marketing task or goal the AI agent needs to perform, e.g., optimize a landing page, generate ad copy, improve SEO.

inputs.name: parameters
inputs.description: Optional parameters including target audience, keywords, campaign details, or performance indicators.

outputs.name: optimized_content
outputs.description: Generated or optimized marketing content such as copywriting, SEO-enhanced text, or growth strategy recommendations.

outputs.name: analytics_report
outputs.description: Analytical insights and recommendations derived from marketing data to inform decisions.

outputs.name: growth_action_plan
outputs.description: A structured plan or set of steps to implement growth engineering techniques.

patterns: Growth engineering iterative testing and scaling
steps: Collect and input relevant marketing data and task description into the system.
Analyze the input for current performance indicators and content quality.
Apply appropriate marketing skill modules such as CRO, SEO, or copywriting.
Generate outputs including optimized content, analytics reports, and growth plans.
Review and iterate based on feedback or further data inputs.
use_cases: AI-assisted creation of persuasive marketing copy.
Optimization of web pages to increase conversion rates.
SEO analysis and enhancement for better search ranking.
Generating growth strategies based on marketing data.
Analyzing marketing analytics to refine campaign effectiveness.

prompt_templates.name: copywriting_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate persuasive marketing copy for a product targeting {target_audience} focusing on {key_features}.

prompt_templates.name: seo_optimization_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the following text and suggest SEO improvements focusing on keywords: {keywords}.

prompt_templates.name: cro_recommendation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Provide recommendations to improve conversion rates for a landing page with current metrics: {metrics}.

prompt_templates.name: growth_plan_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Create a growth engineering plan to scale marketing efforts targeting {market_segment} based on recent analytics data.
